author: dzplnk
description: Shows an unread badge next to notes and folders that haven't been opened since they were last modified. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Alex Desplanque
manifest.description: Shows an unread badge next to notes and folders that haven't been opened since they were last modified.
manifest.name: Unread Badge

name: Unread Badge

releases.author: dzplnk
releases.description:
## What's new

- **Active note never shows the unread badge.** While you're viewing a note, edits keep its read state in step, so it doesn't flash unread the moment you switch tabs. Splits (multiple notes visible at once) are all treated as read.
- **Cross-device read state.** When the vault is synced (iCloud, Obsidian Sync, etc.), reads and unreads now merge across devices instead of last-writer-wins. The plugin re-reads on-disk state before saving and keeps the later timestamp per file. Plugin state is also reloaded on window focus, so reads from your other device show up without a restart.
- **Mark-as-unread is now durable.** Previously this just deleted the read entry, which a stale read from another device could undo. It's now stored as its own timestamp and wins against any older read.

Existing `data.json` files are upgraded automatically — no action needed.

releases.author: dzplnk
releases.description: Fix lint issues flagged by ObsidianReviewBot: handle unhandled promises, remove unnecessary type assertion, remove unused imports.

releases.author: dzplnk
releases.description:
## What's new

- **Right-click context menu** — mark individual notes or entire folders as read/unread directly from the file explorer
  - Mark as unread: restores the badge on a note you've already opened
  - Mark as read: clears the badge without opening the note
  - Folder actions apply recursively to all notes inside

releases.author: dzplnk
releases.description: Initial release — unread badge indicators for notes and folders in the file explorer.
